creator: i.dani@outlook.com
text:
Cacti 1.2.24 has been released with a lot of bugfixes and compatibility for PHP 8.x. Due to PHP 7.X being end of life, it would be quite nice, to have this upgrade sooner than later. As there were quite many changes on how the paths are detected, help is needed to provide a patch for the update.

- Changelog: https://www.cacti.net/info/changelog
- Highlights: PHP 8.x compatibility
